goal: Scope server to only track agent-conductor sessions and directives, remove multi-repo scanning

risks: 1. Hardcoding the project directory name (-Users-yangyang-Repos-agent-conductor) makes the server non-portable if the repo moves or another developer clones it elsewhere. Need to derive it from the actual repo path, not hardcode it.

2. The ProjectGroup abstraction is used in dashboard types (DashboardState, SessionsPage, SessionTree) and WebSocket messages (projects_updated). Removing it entirely would break the frontend contract. Safer to keep the type but ensure only one group ever exists.

3. The session-watcher currently watches all of ~/.claude/projects/ via chokidar. Narrowing the watch path to a single subdirectory is straightforward, but if the directory name derivation is wrong, zero sessions get discovered and the dashboard goes blank with no obvious error.
over_engineering_flags: Don't rip out ProjectGroup from the type system and every frontend component — that's a large refactor for zero user value. Just filter at the discovery layer and the rest naturally produces one group.
Don't add a config file or environment variable for the project filter. Derive it from the repo path at startup. Keep it simple.
challenges.recommendation: Proceed. This is a focused filtering change at two chokepoints: discoverSessionFiles() and session-watcher watch path. The ProjectGroup type stays but only ever contains one entry. Simple, low-risk, high-value — massively reduces startup time (1344 sessions down to ~200) and removes noise from the dashboard.

projects.title: Filter session scanning and watching to agent-conductor project only
projects.scope_summary: Modify discoverSessionFiles() to only scan the project directory matching agent-conductor (derived from the repo root path, not hardcoded). Narrow session-watcher to watch only that subdirectory instead of all projects/. Remove any multi-repo config or scanning logic that is now dead code. The ProjectGroup type and frontend components stay as-is — they will naturally contain only one group. Verify startup bootstraps fewer sessions and dashboard shows only agent-conductor sessions.
